What is the difference between my_list.s.question_text: What is the difference between my_list.sort(reverse=True) and my_list.reverse()
What is the difference between my_list.s.answer_text:
my_list.sort(reverse=True), sorts the list in descending order

my_list.reverse() flips the list in place and does not sort the list
